summary: W904 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while replacing W903's separate target-difference-surjectivity and target-codomain-compactness provider leaves with the existing W715 target-surjective-compact provider. This preserves the W899/W900/W901/W902/W903 endpoint-homology-free closed-map route and keeps W716 boundary data, W717 relation data, W722 source triangulation, W856 endpoint facts, and W721 localized-right-adjoint data intact. Product success remains false because the remaining explicit fields, the final original-four-task witness, and the completion review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W904 bundles W903 target data through W715, but the remaining W904 concrete leaves are still not instantiated.

W904 is still a closed-map branch route. The W898 closed-embedding endpoint-homology-free branch remains separately available; no no-argument branch choice or final original-four-task witness has been constructed.

The remaining W904 fields are selected-difference closed-map components, mapped explicit cokernel closed-map data, strict preimage object fields, strict preimage map fields, identity and composition coherence, source-image normalization, fixed-target uniqueness obligations, the W716 boundary-data provider, the W717 relation-data provider, the W715 target-surjective-compact provider, the W722 source-triangulation provider, the W856 endpoint topology facts provider, and the W721 localized-right-adjoint data provider.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block concrete values for the twenty-eight W904 closed-map target-data relation-data boundary-data source-triangulation endpoint-facts explicit field inputs.

Choose whether the next smallest contract-closing increment should bundle W718 selected closed-map components, W519 mapped-cokernel closed-map data, strict preimage object/map fields, fixed-target uniqueness, source-image normalization, or another currently supported provider boundary.
Connect a real no-argument route to the original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real rather than merely exposed as fields.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
